ksa_text: Define, document, and implement enterprise metric definitions in the semantic layer, ensuring consistency across BI tools, business intelligence platforms, and analytical consumers through metric governance.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA DA-T-005 (Data Architecture/Task) scores 0.423 composite (highest: DDaT at 0.423). Scope is edge_case for Clinical AI Specialist: 0 in-scope signals, 0 out-of-scope signals. Seniority is appropriate.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Include consistent with edge_case scope, Data Architecture, composite 0.423. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Data Architecture for Clinical AI Specialist at this seniority?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Data Architecture appears in ~35% of Clinical AI Specialist postings as a secondary competency. Clinical data architecture (FHIR/HL7) relevant for integration-focused roles. Zero role-specific signals insufficient for inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. Data Architecture without role signals not market-supported. Final decision: exclude.
